title: U Cinn - Cholesterol Concentration
author: Patrick Tso
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xiifkce

steps.title: Prepare working standards by making a...
steps.instruction: Prepare working standards by making a serial dilution of the stock 200mg/dl standard.

steps.title: Using a 96 well flat bottom...
steps.instruction: Using a 96 well flat bottom plate, into separate wells, pipette 2μL of deionized water, standard, or sample to be assayed.

steps.title: Add 200μL of Reagent (supplied ready...
steps.instruction: Add 200μL of Reagent (supplied ready to use) to all wells.

steps.title: Determine the absorbance (abs) of the...
steps.instruction: Determine the absorbance (abs) of the standards and of each unknown at 500nm.

steps.title: Calculate values of unknowns from the standard curve
steps.instruction: Calculate values of unknowns from the standard curve. Specimen: Serum or Plasma. Specimen stable for 7 days at 2-8°C or 3 months at -20°C. Assay Linearity: 774 mg/dl Reagent Stability: Until Expiry on Bottle at 2-8°C Stability of Final Reaction: 60 minutes
